codeExamples.curl:
curl -X POST 'http://localhost:3011/auth/key-request' \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{"appName":"Test Discord Bot","appDescription":"A test integration","scopes":["entity:read","roll:read","chat:read"]}'
codeExamples.python:
import requests

base_url = 'http://localhost:3011'
path = '/auth/key-request'
url = f'{base_url}{path}'

response = requests.post(
    url,
    json={
      "appName": "Test Discord Bot",
      "appDescription": "A test integration",
      "scopes": [
        "entity:read",
        "roll:read",
        "chat:read"
      ]
    }
)
data = response.json()
print(data)
codeExamples.emojicode:
📦 sockets 🏠

💭 Emojicode HTTP Client
💭 Compile: emojicodec example.🍇 -o example
💭 Run: ./example

  3011 ➡️ port
  🔤/auth/key-request🔤 ➡️ path

  💭 Request body
  🔤{"appName":"Test Discord Bot","appDescription":"A test integration","scopes":["entity:read","roll:read","chat:read"]}🔤 ➡️ body

  💭 Build HTTP request
  🔤POST /auth/key-request HTTP/1.1❌r❌nHost: localhost:3011❌r❌nContent-Type: application/json❌r❌nContent-Length: 117❌r❌n❌r❌n{"appName":"Test Discord Bot","appDescription":"A test integration","scopes":["entity:read","roll:read","chat:read"]}🔤 ➡️ request

  💭 Connect and send
  🍺 🆕📞 host port❗ ➡️ socket
  🍺 💬 socket 📇 request❗❗
  
  💭 Read and print response
  🍺 👂 socket 4096❗ ➡️ data
  😀 🍺 🔡 data❗❗
  
  💭 Close socket
  🚪 socket❗

codeExamples.python:
import requests

base_url = 'http://localhost:3011'
path = '/auth/key-request/ANNTCM'
url = f'{base_url}{path}'

response = requests.get(
    url,
    headers={
        'Authorization': 'Bearer 63adfd8bea624ffab4373f63d5c0fe28e552beaa85e13f11e52d5c6f9e26793b'
    }
)
data = response.json()
print(data)

import requests

base_url = 'http://localhost:3011'
path = '/auth/key-request/ANNTCM/status'
url = f'{base_url}{path}'

response = requests.get(
    url
)
data = response.json()
print(data)

codeExamples.python:
import requests

base_url = 'http://localhost:3011'
path = '/auth/key-request/exchange'
url = f'{base_url}{path}'

response = requests.post(
    url,
    json={
      "code": "01500928781afdf75b4b50d17e4f7c5b"
    }
)
data = response.json()
print(data)
